raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"Multiple logical gaps are present: 'uniform outperformance' of deep detectors over classical baselines is stated as an established, closed fact without citation; quality-lift in AMT ratings is attributed 'entirely' to the gating step without ruling out confounds from batch composition, annotator variation, or prompt effects.","R1.3":"Several sweeping claims are made without supporting evidence or reference: 'deep neural anomaly detectors uniformly outperform classical baselines across the full range of anomaly-detection settings,' 'closed question,' and causal attribution of downstream quality improvement 'entirely' to the gating step are all empirical assertions requiring substantiation.","R1.6":"Both paragraphs contain run-on sentences fused by commas rather than proper coordination (notably the motivation sentence and the 'Concretely' paragraph), tense inconsistency ('was then trained' vs. present-tense framing), and missing punctuation after subordinate clauses, reducing readability and obscuring the logical sequence."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I focus my review primarily on the paragraph's substantive claims and reasoning (logical validity, evidence support), rather than on its prose quality and writing style?"}

rationale.R1.2: Multiple logical gaps are present: 'uniform outperformance' of deep detectors over classical baselines is stated as an established, closed fact without citation; quality-lift in AMT ratings is attributed 'entirely' to the gating step without ruling out confounds from batch composition, annotator variation, or prompt effects.
rationale.R1.3: Several sweeping claims are made without supporting evidence or reference: 'deep neural anomaly detectors uniformly outperform classical baselines across the full range of anomaly-detection settings,' 'closed question,' and causal attribution of downstream quality improvement 'entirely' to the gating step are all empirical assertions requiring substantiation.
rationale.R1.6: Both paragraphs contain run-on sentences fused by commas rather than proper coordination (notably the motivation sentence and the 'Concretely' paragraph), tense inconsistency ('was then trained' vs. present-tense framing), and missing punctuation after subordinate clauses, reducing readability and obscuring the logical sequence.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus my review primarily on the paragraph's substantive claims and reasoning (logical validity, evidence support), rather than on its prose quality and writing style?
